findings.note: All 3 TS6133 errors confirmed: resolutionScale in scene.ts, enableSparkle in particleField.ts, enableShimmer in waveField.ts. Trivial fix.
Test files correctly identified. Existing tests (scene.test.ts, resize.test.ts) already partially updated with Three.js mocks. Remaining test files still reference Canvas 2D APIs and need updating.
Verification criteria are complete and aligned with ticket acceptance criteria.

risks_assessment: Both identified risks are valid. The Three.js mocking risk is mitigated by tests/setup.ts already containing partial mock infrastructure. The Canvas 2D removal risk is low since it is intentional and git history preserves the old code.
decision: The plan is accurate, well-structured, and correctly reflects the current codebase state. All completed steps (1–8) are verified against the working tree. The three remaining steps (9–11) are correctly scoped and ordered.
